title: vicia monantha subsp. monantha
intro: Vicia monantha subsp. monantha is a subspecies of annual legume plant, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Vicia monantha subsp. monantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
